## Meeting Purpose

[Review proposal for community work trial and discuss potential collaboration on course/content creation for AI-led Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [David proposed creating a comprehensive GEO/AEO guide, enhancing existing course content, and developing promotional assets](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Jason needs to refine overall content strategy and structure before moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Potential to collaborate on upcoming Webflow workshop as proof-of-concept](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Opportunity to create executive-focused content and tiered community structure](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2715.0)

## Topics

### Proposal Overview

  - [Create 8-10 page e-book style guide on GEO/AEO (why now, what's changed, action items, measurement)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Enhance existing workshop content into more cohesive course format](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Develop downloadable assets for each lesson (checklists, frameworks, case studies, prompt packs)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Create promotional assets (LinkedIn carousel, shortened guide version for AI-led Growth site)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Measure impact on answer engine visibility](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Current Content Structure

  - [Existing courses have overlap in topics (GEO/AEO overview, content creation)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Jason considering merging courses and refining overall structure](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Potential to break content into 4 main sections: analysis/insights, content strategy, content creation, distribution/conversion](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2187.0)

### Collaboration Approach

  - [Weekly calls for updates and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Slack channel for quick communication](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Utilize Jason's team for video/design work](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [David's team to focus on content structure and enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### Guide vs Course Format

  - [Guide: Compact, quick-consumable format (15-min read)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Course: More in-depth, step-by-step content with exercises and capstone project](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Example of guide format: Databricks executive guides/case studies](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2666.0)

### Community Strategy

  - [Consider more aggressive email collection strategy](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2879.0)
  - [Explore tiered access (free signup for one course, paid for additional content)](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [Potential to create executive-focused tier with tailored content](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2912.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore creating executive-focused content and tiered community structure](https://fathom.video/share/a2w1xJs5UaxPgq3F_Gt2csPK4eNHSxec?tab=summary&timestamp=2715.0)
